messages.content:
I need you to check each of these URLs and tell me if they look like valid HTTP/HTTPS URLs. Just respond with 'valid' or 'invalid' for each one.

1. https://www.example.com/page
2. htp://broken.link
3. https://api.service.io/v2/users?id=123
4. www.noprotocol.com
5. https://
6. http://localhost:3000/test
7. https://sub.domain.example.org/path/to/resource.html
8. ftp://files.server.net/doc.pdf
9. https://valid-site.com/search?q=test&page=2
10. http//missing-colon.com

Here are the results:

1. https://www.example.com/page - valid
2. htp://broken.link - invalid (protocol is 'htp' not 'http')
3. https://api.service.io/v2/users?id=123 - valid
4. www.noprotocol.com - invalid (missing http:// or https:// protocol)
5. https:// - invalid (no domain after protocol)
6. http://localhost:3000/test - valid
7. https://sub.domain.example.org/path/to/resource.html - valid
8. ftp://files.server.net/doc.pdf - invalid (FTP, not HTTP/HTTPS)
9. https://valid-site.com/search?q=test&page=2 - valid
10. http//missing-colon.com - invalid (missing colon after 'http')

Good. Here's the next batch of 10.

11. https://example.com:8080/api
12. http:/example.com
13. https://my-site.com/about#section
14. ://no-protocol.com
15. https://192.168.1.1/admin
16. https://example .com/space
17. http://valid-example.net/path
18. https://example.com/path with spaces
19. https://xn--n3h.com/unicode
20. httpss://double-s.com

Here are the results:

11. https://example.com:8080/api - valid
12. http:/example.com - invalid (missing second slash after 'http:')
13. https://my-site.com/about#section - valid
14. ://no-protocol.com - invalid (no protocol name before '://')
15. https://192.168.1.1/admin - valid
16. https://example .com/space - invalid (space in domain name)
17. http://valid-example.net/path - valid
18. https://example.com/path with spaces - invalid (unencoded spaces in path)
19. https://xn--n3h.com/unicode - valid
20. httpss://double-s.com - invalid (protocol is 'httpss' not 'https')
Alright, there are 3 more batches after this. Same format please.

scenario: Manually validating a long list of URLs one by one

messages.content:
I need to generate placeholder text for 5 different sections of a website. Each section needs exactly 3 sentences, and the sentences must be about the topic I give you. Keep them generic and corporate-sounding.

Section 1: About Us

Section 1 - About Us:

We are a dedicated team of professionals committed to delivering innovative solutions that drive meaningful results for our clients. With over a decade of industry experience, our company has established itself as a trusted partner for businesses across diverse sectors. Our mission is to empower organizations through cutting-edge technology and personalized service.
Section 2: Our Services

Section 2 - Our Services:

We offer a comprehensive suite of services designed to meet the evolving needs of modern businesses. From strategic consulting to end-to-end implementation, our team works closely with clients to develop tailored solutions that maximize efficiency and growth. Each engagement is guided by our commitment to quality, transparency, and measurable outcomes.
Section 3: Careers

Section 3 - Careers:

Join our growing team of talented professionals who are passionate about making a difference. We offer competitive compensation, comprehensive benefits, and a collaborative work environment that fosters both personal and professional development. Explore our current openings and discover how you can contribute to our shared mission of excellence.
Section 4: Contact Us

Section 4 - Contact Us:

We would love to hear from you and learn more about how we can support your goals. Our dedicated team is available to answer your questions, provide detailed information about our services, and schedule a personalized consultation. Reach out to us today and take the first step toward a successful partnership.
Section 5: Privacy Policy

Section 5 - Privacy Policy:

Protecting your personal information is a top priority for our organization. We are committed to maintaining the highest standards of data privacy and security in compliance with all applicable regulations. Please review our detailed privacy practices below to understand how we collect, use, and safeguard your information.
OK now I need you to do the same thing but for a different website. Same format. Section 1: About Us

Section 1 - About Us:

Founded on the principles of integrity and innovation, our company has been at the forefront of industry transformation for more than fifteen years. We bring together a diverse team of experts who share a common vision of creating lasting value for our clients and communities. Our approach combines deep domain knowledge with a relentless focus on customer satisfaction.

scenario: Generating repetitive placeholder text for multiple website sections

messages.content:
Count the number of words in each of these paragraphs separately:

Paragraph 1: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog near the old wooden fence by the river.

Paragraph 2: She sells seashells by the seashore and the shells she sells are seashells for sure.

Paragraph 3: How much wood would a woodchuck chuck if a woodchuck could chuck wood.

Here are the word counts:

Paragraph 1: "The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog near the old wooden fence by the river."
Word count: 16

Paragraph 2: "She sells seashells by the seashore and the shells she sells are seashells for sure."
Word count: 15

Paragraph 3: "How much wood would a woodchuck chuck if a woodchuck could chuck wood."
Word count: 12

OK now do these:

Paragraph 4: It was the best of times and it was the worst of times and it was the age of wisdom.

Paragraph 5: To be or not to be that is the question whether it is nobler in the mind to suffer.

Paragraph 6: All happy families are alike but each unhappy family is unhappy in its own way and that is the truth of it.

Here are the word counts:

Paragraph 4: "It was the best of times and it was the worst of times and it was the age of wisdom."
Word count: 19

Paragraph 5: "To be or not to be that is the question whether it is nobler in the mind to suffer."
Word count: 18

Paragraph 6: "All happy families are alike but each unhappy family is unhappy in its own way and that is the truth of it."
Word count: 21
I have 12 more paragraphs to count. Same format please.

scenario: Manually counting words in paragraphs one at a time

messages.content: Two more batches to go. Keep going with the same format.
